mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_user WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND user_pw = #{userPw}
SELECT user_no, user_nickname, user_email, user_phone_num, user_pw, user_type, user_status FROM tbl_user WHERE user_no = #{userNo}
SELECT u.user_email, o.organ_name, o.organ_cert_num FROM tbl_user u JOIN tbl_organ o ON u.organ_no = o.organ_no WHERE u.user_no = #{userNo}

SELECT N.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, IFNULL(H.VOLUN_COUNT, 0) AS volunActNo, IFNULL(H.TOTAL_VOLUN_TIME, 0) AS totalVolunTime,
(SELECT IFNULL(MAX(RANK_POINT), 0) FROM TBL_RANKING R WHERE R.USER_NO = N.USER_NO) AS rankPoint,
(SELECT IFNULL(KKOMI_LEV, 1) FROM TBL_KKOMI K WHERE K.USER_NO = N.USER_NO) AS kkomiLev,
(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) FROM TBL_CURRENCY C WHERE C.USER_NO = N.USER_NO) AS totalAmount
FROM TBL_USER N
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT USER_NO, COUNT(LOG_NO) AS VOLUN_COUNT, SUM(VOLUN_TIME) AS TOTAL_VOLUN_TIME FROM TBL_VOLUN_HISTORY GROUP BY USER_NO ) H ON N.USER_NO = H.USER_NO
WHERE N.USER_NO = #{userNo}
SELECT LOG_REASON, DATE_FORMAT(LOG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS logDate, CHANGE_AMOUNT FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC

SELECT tva.volun_act_title AS volunActTitle, DATE_FORMAT(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, '%Y-%m-%d') AS comVolunActProcBegin, DATE_FORMAT(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End, '%Y-%m-%d') AS comVolunActProcEnd FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 AND tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin >= CURDATE() ORDER BY tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End LIMIT 1

SELECT tva.volun_act_no AS volunActNo, tva.volun_act_title AS volunActTitle, DATE_FORMAT(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin, '%Y-%m-%d') AS comVolunActProcBegin, DATE_FORMAT(tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End, '%Y-%m-%d') AS comVolunActProcEnd FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 AND tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin >= CURDATE() ORDER BY tva.Volun_Act_Proc_End LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND apl.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS = 1 AND tva.Volun_Act_Proc_Begin >= CURDATE()

SELECT tvapp.VOLUN_ACT_NO AS volunActNo, tvac.VOLUN_ACT_TITLE AS volunActTitle, DATE_FORMAT(tvac.VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finVolunActProcEnd, tvapp.VOLUNACT_APPLYSTATUS AS applyStatus, tvapp.VOLUNACT_ATTENDANCE AS attendance FROM TBL_VOLUN_APPLY tvapp JOIN TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tvac ON tvapp.VOLUN_ACT_NO = tvac.VOLUN_ACT_NO WHERE tvac.VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END < NOW() AND tvapp.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY tvac.VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_VOLUN_ACTIVITY tva JOIN TBL_VOLUN_APPLY apl ON tva.volun_act_no = apl.volun_act_no WHERE apl.user_no = #{userNo} AND tva.VOLUN_ACT_PROC_END < NOW()

SELECT log_reason AS logReason, DATE_FORMAT(LOG_DATE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS logDate, change_amount AS changeAmount FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0 ORDER BY LOG_NO DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LOG_POINT WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND CHANGE_AMOUNT < 0

SELECT tcp.post_no AS postNo, tcp.post_title AS postTitle, DATE_FORMAT(tcp.post_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS postDate, ( SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no ) AS postLikeNo FROM tbl_community_post tcp WHERE tcp.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY tcp.post_no DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
